name: blockchain-web3-engineering
description: Blockchain & Web3 Engineering specialist team — 4 agents (web3-architect-lead, smart-contract-security-analyst, gas-optimization-specialist, protocol-economics-specialist), 5 skills, 4 templates, 5 commands, 1 advisory hook, 8 best-practice rules, and a 4-file research-grounded knowledge bank. A Web3 team for an engineer or protocol architect accountable for a contract system that holds value — it treats deploy as irreversible and audit as the gate, holds reentrancy/access-control/arithmetic as the top vuln classes, reads gas as UX and cost, and tests invariants not just the happy path. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
